scripts.db:push: bun run --filter auth-service prisma:push && bun run --filter conversation-service prisma:push && bun run --filter handle-service prisma:push && bun run --filter message-service prisma:push && bun run --filter users-service prisma:push && bun run --filter bot-service prisma:push
scripts.db:generate: bun run --filter auth-service prisma:generate && bun run --filter conversation-service prisma:generate && bun run --filter handle-service prisma:generate && bun run --filter message-service prisma:generate && bun run --filter users-service prisma:generate && bun run --filter bot-service prisma:generate
scripts.db:sync: bun run db:push && bun run db:generate
